TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ji'an Itini i Hualien ko Ji'an Siyang. sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko 62.65 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 0 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 0.68 km²), 78,633 ko tamdaw i Ji'an Siyang, 29,613 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 14,299 a tamdaw, pakaala to 18%(Amis阿美族, Truku太魯閣族) no polong no tamdaw. Itini i niyaro' a finawlan, o Payrang ko sa'alomanay. O kasaniyarona 18 ko cun, 23 ko niyaro' i Ji'an Siyang. Natawran , Pukpuk , Lidaw , Mabuwakay , Cikasuwan , Isaetipan pahikukian , Isawalian pahikukian , Taracan , Citekudan , Cikeliwan , Atonan , Ciripunan , Sarad , Kungkung , Hacining , Fulufuluan , Alang gnaalu , Alang mkibuhw , Alang kiyumi , Alang miyamay , Buner , Sirakesay , Ciyibangcalay .
S.PHON: *iʡan itini i ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u *iʡan sijaŋ. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u **.** km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u * km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u *.** km*), **,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i *iʡan sijaŋ, **,*** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u **,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(amis***, tro~u~uko~u~u****) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. itini i nijaro~uʡ a finawɾan, o~u pajraŋ ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj. o~u kasanijaro~una ** ko~u ʦo~u~un, ** ko~u nijaro~uʡ i *iʡan sijaŋ. natawran , po~u~ukpo~u~uk , ɾiɬ~ɮaw , mab~b~vo~u~uwakaj , ʦikaso~u~uwan , isaətipan paħiko~u~ukian , isawaɾian paħiko~u~ukian , taraʦan , ʦitəko~u~uɬ~ɮan , ʦikəɾiwan , ato~unan , ʦiripo~u~unan , saraɬ~ɮ , ko~u~uŋko~u~uŋ , ħaʦiniŋ , fo~u~uɾo~u~ufo~u~uɾo~u~uan , aɾaŋ *naaɾo~u~u , aɾaŋ mkib~b~vo~u~uħw , aɾaŋ kijo~u~umi , aɾaŋ mijamaj , b~b~vo~u~unər , sirakəsaj , ʦijib~b~vaŋʦaɾaj .
S.FORM: Ji'an Itini i Hualien ko Ji'an Siyang. sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko 62.65 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 0 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 0.68 km²), 78,633 ko tamdaw i Ji'an Siyang, 29,613 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 14,299 a tamdaw, pakaala to 18%(Amis阿美族, Truku太魯閣族) no polong no tamdaw. Itini i niyaro' a finawlan, o Payrang ko sa'alomanay. O kasaniyarona 18 ko cun, 23 ko niyaro' i Ji'an Siyang. Natawran , Pukpuk , Lidaw , Mabuwakay , Cikasuwan , Isaetipan pahikukian , Isawalian pahikukian , Taracan , Citekudan , Cikeliwan , Atonan , Ciripunan , Sarad , Kungkung , Hacining , Fulufuluan , Alang gnaalu , Alang mkibuhw , Alang kiyumi , Alang miyamay , Buner , Sirakesay , Ciyibangcalay .
S.PHON: *iʡan itini i ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u *iʡan sijaŋ. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u **.** km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u * km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u *.** km*), **,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i *iʡan sijaŋ, **,*** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u **,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(amis***, tro~u~uko~u~u****) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. itini i nijaro~uʡ a finawɾan, o~u pajraŋ ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj. o~u kasanijaro~una ** ko~u ʦo~u~un, ** ko~u nijaro~uʡ i *iʡan sijaŋ. natawran , po~u~ukpo~u~uk , ɾiɬ~ɮaw , mab~b~vo~u~uwakaj , ʦikaso~u~uwan , isaətipan paħiko~u~ukian , isawaɾian paħiko~u~ukian , taraʦan , ʦitəko~u~uɬ~ɮan , ʦikəɾiwan , ato~unan , ʦiripo~u~unan , saraɬ~ɮ , ko~u~uŋko~u~uŋ , ħaʦiniŋ , fo~u~uɾo~u~ufo~u~uɾo~u~uan , aɾaŋ *naaɾo~u~u , aɾaŋ mkib~b~vo~u~uħw , aɾaŋ kijo~u~umi , aɾaŋ mijamaj , b~b~vo~u~unər , sirakəsaj , ʦijib~b~vaŋʦaɾaj .
